name: Tulip
lastFunding: $120M Series D led by Mitsubishi Electric (Jan 2026)
positioning: No-code frontline operations platform that empowers manufacturers to build custom apps for shop floor digitization, combining machine connectivity, analytics, and worker guidance for Industry 4.0 transformation. Proven across automotive, aerospace, pharma, and electronics verticals.
strengths: No-code app builder loved by engineers and frontline teams - fastest time-to-value
Strong machine connectivity and IoT integration across all major protocols
Comprehensive platform: work instructions + quality + analytics + traceability + maintenance
Fast deployment (2-4 weeks typical) with immediate ROI
AI Composer converts SOPs/videos to apps in minutes
Tulip AI Agents for configurable automation and analysis
OpsMoto enterprise dashboard for global visibility
Growing library of 100+ reusable templates and industry-specific apps
Strategic partnership with Mitsubishi Electric for global expansion
Acquired Akooda (Nov 2025) for AI-driven operations intelligence
Unicorn status ($1.3B valuation) validates market leadership
weaknesses: Smaller than Siemens/Rockwell in enterprise MES market
Less vertical-specific regulatory depth than niche players (e.g., Apprentice in pharma validation)
Requires change management and training for full adoption
Platform breadth can seem complex vs single-purpose tools
Growing fast but still smaller sales team than legacy MES vendors
pricingNotes: Subscription model with per-user pricing + platform fee. Typical mid-market: $50K-200K annual. Enterprise: $200K-$1M+ depending on scale. More accessible than legacy MES ($250K-$2M+) while offering comparable capabilities. Free trial and POC programs available.
aiClaims: **Industry-leading AI capabilities:** AI Composer (SOP-to-app conversion using GPT), Tulip AI Agents (configurable automation), Vision AI (quality inspection), Frontline Copilot (operator assistance). Acquired Akooda (Nov 2025) for contextual enterprise AI and real-time operations intelligence. Focus on practical, production-ready AI vs vaporware.
keyProducts: AI Composer - SOP to app conversion
recentNews: Raised $120M Series D led by Mitsubishi Electric (Jan 2026)
Acquired Akooda for AI-driven operations intelligence (Nov 2025)
Launched AI Composer for SOP-to-app conversion (2025)
Introduced Tulip AI Agents for configurable automation (2025)
Expanded Library with no-code MES app suites (June 2025)
Strategic alliance with Mitsubishi Electric for global expansion
aiDevelopments: AI Composer launched - converts documents/videos to apps using GPT
Tulip AI Agents - run inside platform, analyze data, automate tasks
Akooda acquisition brings contextual enterprise AI (Nov 2025)
Vision AI integrations with third-party models
marketPosition: #3 by revenue in frontline operations category. Leading innovator in manufacturing AI. Fastest-growing platform in mid-market discrete manufacturing.
competitiveAdvantages: Only no-code platform with enterprise MES capabilities
Most comprehensive AI suite (Composer + Agents + Vision)
Unicorn status and strong funding runway
Mitsubishi partnership opens global enterprise accounts
